Patch Set 1:

It looks reasonable. I was wondering about "ls -l" type of workloads with readdir()+stat(), but the readdir() happens in the MDS long before the client does a stat() call.

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

If this fails because of LU-13916 again we should consider rebasing into the fix patch.

parents.subject: LU-6142 lustre: don't take spinlock to read a 'long'.

commit.subject: LU-13922 osd-ldiskfs: no need to add OI cache in readdir
commit.message:
LU-13922 osd-ldiskfs: no need to add OI cache in readdir

It's a waste of time to call osd_add_oi_cache() in osd_it_ea_rec(),
because each dirent read will override it.

Signed-off-by: Lai Siyao <lai.siyao@whamcloud.com>
